title: Mace Fusion
description: Mace Fusion gives the Minecraft mace a cleaner, more polished look with a refined 3D model
body:
## 📦 Mace Fusion
**Mace Fusion** is a Java Edition resource pack that enhances the **classic Minecraft mace** with a **new 3D model** and refined textures for a **cleaner, more polished look.** The pack keeps the **iconic mace style** while **subtly improving** its overall appearance.

✨ You can use the [**Enchantment Glint Outline**](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-glint-outline) mod to get a **glint outline effect** when enchanting your mace.

✅ **Recommended for players who:**

- Want a **cleaner, enhanced mace appearance**

- Enjoy **subtle 3D improvements** that match Minecraft’s original style

💬 If you want to **share feedback** or **ideas** about the project, please leave a comment on [**CurseForge**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mace-fusion/comments)

Inspired by **Actions & Stuff**

![Mace in Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b99479bc3e0f1611477522cfbea6d4b9572ff3fd.png)
